parameters.apprise_url_plus: slack://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.token_a_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.token_b_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.token_c_secret }} }
parameters.description: Send notifications to your own Slack destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise slack:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway channels skip Apprise and transform the envelope into a native Slack incoming-webhook {text} payload delivered straight to hooks.slack.com.
parameters.gateway_body_template: {"text":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(((_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="") and "\n" or "")..(_body.body or "")) *}}
parameters.gateway_price_description: Free — direct to your Slack incoming webhook (no Apprise)
parameters.gateway_plus_price_description: $0.001 per message — extra per-enrollment Slack destinations, direct
parameters.gateway_url_plus: ${ customer_secrets.SLACK_WEBHOOK_BASE ?? https://hooks.slack.com/services }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.token_a_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.token_b_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.token_c_secret }} }

token_a_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Slack token a

token_b_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Slack token b

token_c_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Slack token c
